reasoning: I will provide a concise summary of the article, highlighting the winner, entrant count, the winner's background and quotes, the organizer's comment, and the event location.
output: More than 300 people entered the Alternative Model of the Year contest in Newcastle, with Zoe Waters, a 19-year-old from Bishop Auckland and a Newcastle University student, crowned the winner. Waters said she was shocked and that she has always dressed “a bit crazy” and plans to model despite being 5ft 3in tall, noting she hadn’t realised how big the alternative modelling world is. Organiser Kieran Martin said the event aims to celebrate sub-cultures amid prejudice and hatred. The final was held at Northumbria University in Newcastle.
